title: Petface (Seriously Strong by Petface) Figure of 8 Rope Dog Toy
features: PET'S FAVOURITE: Let your furry friend indulge in hours of interactive play, stimulating their playful instincts with a seriously strong rope toy
DURABLE DESIGN: Made from tough materials for long-lasting chew and toss fun, perfect for keeping your pet entertained
VERSATILE: This figure of 8 rope toy is great for tug-of-war games and solo chewing sessions, promoting healthy gums and teeth
SAFE FUN: The durable construction ensures safety during playtime while satisfying your pet's urge to chew and tug on toys

KEEPING SAFE: This toy is strong but not indestructible, and will eventually become susceptible to ‘Chew’ Damage. Please supervise your pet with this toy, and examine regularly for wear and replace if any damage could be seen a health hazard
description: From the manufacturer Petface - your pets best friend - whether it's collars, leads, feeding, bedding or toys our product experts design with your pet in mind! The Petface range is of the highest quality and provides fun, innovative and interactive products to keep your pets fit, healthy and enjoying life! Shop for your favourite dog, cats and wild bird products for great value! Seriously Strong by Petface Figure of 8 Rope Dog Toy Our Figure of 8 Rope Dog Toy will challenge the toughest of gnashers, bringing out the hunting instincts in your dog as they shake, toss and chew this engaging toy. Dogs will enjoy tugging and grabbing the toy, having it bash against the ground encouraging them to do it all the more. With a superb grip and comfortable to hold in the hand, this exciting toy can be thrown with great force for your dog to fetch and retrieve. ABOUT PETFACE All your needs are covered with the Petface range, including collars, leads, toys, feeding, coats and bedding. The designers at Petface have ensured the range has a co-ordinated look and style making sure your pets will be the ‘best dressed in town’. TREAT YOUR PAMPERED POOCH Treat your dog to their very own rope toy, ideal for interactive play. Dogs are playful by nature; our Figure of 8 Rope Toy will give your pet hours of fun and help to keep them fit and healthy. YOU DOG'S BEST FRIEND Awesome interactive fun will be had between dog and owner as a tug of war ensues, keeping them fit and healthy. Durable and long-lasting toy suitable for medium/large active dogs.

specifications_table.Breed Recommendation: All Breed Sizes, Small, Medium, Large
specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Exercise, Mental Health, Physical Development, Playing, Teething
